"children": [{"text": "To customise your POS Receipts:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In Logos will be resized automatically."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CustomisePOSReceipts2.05T5g00000szX6PEAU.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CustomisePOSReceipts2.05T5g00000szX6PEAU.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image2", "width": 700, "height": 246}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once complete, click "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Using the above example, here's how our new receipt looks when printed through a browser. Logos will be black and white when printed on a thermal printer."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CustomisePOSReceipts3.05T5g00000szX1VEAU.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CustomisePOSReceipts3.05T5g00000szX1VEAU.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image3", "width": 700, "height": 615}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Email receipts will also include the header and footer information entered, and the invoice logo configured in Settings & Tools > Logos."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Update Business Details on Receipts"}], "data-id": "update-business-details-on-receipts"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your receipt will display your business details including your business name, address, phone number and ABN. Follow these instructions to edit these details:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Business Name and ABN"}], "data-id": "business-name-and-abn"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In your Maropost Commerce control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Business Details", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Update the ABN and/or business name fields as you'd like them to display on your receipts."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Outlet Address"}], "data-id": "outlet-address"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Maropost POS supports multiple outlets, so your receipts will be printed with the details of each outlet rather than your primary address."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In your Maropost Commerce control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Stock Control", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Warehouses / Locations", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select the outlet you want to update the details for."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Follow the on-screen instructions to edit the address of the related outlet."}]}]}]}]
